title: Tubular Lockset, Door Knob, Stainless Steel Doorknob with Lock and 3 Keys, Privacy Door Knob, House Door Handle Lock Set for Bedroom, Bathroom, Kids Room
features: 【Safety and Aesthetics】: This lock provides security for your door without compromising the aesthetics of the opening. This lock would enhance security and safety or your privacy, classic elegant appearance design, creating a stylish and complete look for your home.

【Rugged and Wear Resistant】: In addition,lock is resistant to time wear, suitable for use in high areas, where use is intensive, no need for professional door fitters, you can do it yourself! Fitting both right and left handed doors.

【Easy Installation】: Make sure the depth of the stroke box matches the hole in the front stroke box. First insert the impact box, then insert the impact plate and secure with the screws provided, the lock is easy to install.

【Good Experience】: For a better experience, the lock can only be assembled with excellent materials, so compared to other locks, the weight of this lock is heavier, and the hand experience is different.

【Corrosion Resistant Stainless Steel】: Stainless steel material tubular lockset possess corrosion resistance, good mechanical properties, high strength, suitable for interior or exterior doors, and bedroom, garage doors.
description: Specification: Item Type: Tubular Lockset Product Material: Stainless steel Weight: 500 g / 17.6 oz(approx.) Package List: 1 x Main Lock 3 x Key 1 x Block Piece 1 x Plastic Block 4 x Screw
